text:
On 28-Nov-99 Chris D. Faulhaber wrote:
> My krubik port that was committed Friday isn't good enough for you? :)

Err, forgive me.. I "caught up" on 2,300 emails on Saturday. I must have missed
that commit. ;-)

That's what I get for being on cvs-all, -current, -ports, -stable, -doc, and a
bucketload of others, and leaving for a week. ;-)

Apologies again. KRubik's a great game, ain't it? :-)

--
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
